name: REZERVEIPTALSD
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[REZERVEIPTALSD] @SB_REF AS INT,@SD_REF AS INT,
@KULLANICI_REF AS INT
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
IF ISNULL((SELECT MIN(SD_REF) FROM REZERVEDETAY WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF),0)>0
BEGIN

	INSERT INTO REZERVEDETAY (STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF,BIRIM_REF,ANABIRIM_REF,SB_REF,SD_REF,ADRES,DURUM_KODU,TAKIP_NO,PALET,PAKET,AMBAR_KODU,MIKTAR,ABMIKTAR,GCI,KAYIT_TARIH,KULLANICI_REF)
	SELECT STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF,BIRIM_REF,ANABIRIM_REF,SB_REF,SD_REF,ADRES,DURUM_KODU,TAKIP_NO,PALET,PAKET,AMBAR_KODU,SUM(MIKTAR)*-1 AS MIKTAR,SUM(ABMIKTAR)*-1 AS ABMIKTAR,2 AS GCI,GETDATE() AS KAYIT_TARIHI,@KULLANICI_REF
	FROM REZERVEDETAY WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF
	GROUP BY STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF,BIRIM_REF,ANABIRIM_REF,SB_REF,SD_REF,ADRES,DURUM_KODU,TAKIP_NO,PALET,PAKET,AMBAR_KODU
	HAVING SUM(ABMIKTAR)<>0
END
ELSE
BEGIN
			IF(@SB_REF>0) BEGIN
				DECLARE @SMIK AS FLOAT
				DECLARE @RMIK AS FLOAT

				SET @SMIK=ISNULL((SELECT SUM(MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR) FROM SIPARISHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND KAPALI=0),0)
				SET @RMIK=ISNULL((SELECT MIKTAR FROM REZERVESB WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF),0)
			
				IF(@SMIK=@RMIK AND @RMIK>0)
				BEGIN
					UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET RZV=1 WHERE RZV<>1 AND SB_REF=@SB_REF
				END
				ELSE
				IF(@SMIK>@RMIK AND @RMIK>0)
				BEGIN
					UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET RZV=2 WHERE RZV<>2 AND SB_REF=@SB_REF
				END			
				ELSE
				IF(@SMIK>0 AND @RMIK=0)
				BEGIN
					UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET RZV=0 WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF
				END	
			END
END
